flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Kentucky Christian University rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($22.1k → $26.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Kentucky Christian University rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($22.1k → $26.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Kentucky Christian University fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (514 → 429).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Kentucky Christian University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).
